summary: Mapo presents a bifurcated picture: 마포구 갑 flipped to PPP (조정훈 48.30% vs 이지은 47.70%, 0.6pp margin), ending a 20-year DPK streak, while 마포구 을 stayed firmly DPK (정청래 52.44%). The narrow flip margin and 조정훈's unusual path (Transition Korea Party → PPP) suggest candidate-specific idiosyncrasy more than structural realignment. This gu-level view uses 마포 을 as representative.

issues.label: Candidate idiosyncrasy
issues.description: 마포 갑's flip is tied to 조정훈's unusual minor-party-to-PPP trajectory and his personal profile, not a broad swing.

issues.label: Young-professional demographic shift
issues.description: Mapo's evolving residential/commercial mix (홍대, 상암 media cluster, redevelopment) may be slowly changing the electorate, but direct evidence is thin in current sources.

issues.label: Narrow-margin noise
issues.description: 0.6pp margin in 마포 갑 is within typical turnout-noise range; caution against over-reading as realignment.
